zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Willoughby於大約1390年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾維洛賀比 奧 馮 沃爾茲時，他的父親Sir Edmund Willoughby31歲，母親Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby14歲。他於1418年5月23日與Margaret Freville在英國諾廷加姆爾沃拉阿頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1430年被列為sheriff of derbyshire。他去世於1448年11月15日在英國諾廷加姆爾沃拉阿頓享年59歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾維洛賀比 奧 馮 沃爾茲。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Willoughby was born about 1390, in Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Edmund Willoughby, was 31 and his mother, Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby, was 14. He married Margaret Freville on 23 May 1418, in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1430, at the age of 41, his occupation is listed as sheriff of derbyshire. He died on 15 November 1448, in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Willoughby est né environ 1390, à Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edmund Willoughby, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Freville le 23 mai 1418, à Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1430, à l’âge de 41 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of derbyshire. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1448, à Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Willoughby um 1390 in Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund Willoughby 31 und seine Mutter Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby 14. Er hat am 23. Mai 1418 in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England Margaret Freville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1430, als er 41 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of derbyshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. November 1448 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England und wurde in Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Willoughby è nato il circa 1390 nel Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Edmund Willoughby, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Freville il 23 maggio 1418, nel Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Willoughbyが約1390年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウィロウビー オン ス ウオルズで生まれた時，父Sir Edmund Willoughbyは31歳，母Isabel Annesely baroness willoughbyは14歳であった。1418年5月23日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオラトンでMargaret Frevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1430年，41歳の時，職業はsheriff of derbyshireと記録されている。彼は1448年11月15日にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウオラトンで59歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアウィロウビー オン ス ウオルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Willoughby(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 노틴그함실르 윌루그h비  테 울드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund Willoughby(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1418년 5월 23일 영국 노틴그함실르 울라턴에서 Margaret Freville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1430년, 41세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of derbyshire이었다. 그는 1448년 11월 15일 영국 노틴그함실르 울라턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르 윌루그h비  테 울드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Willoughby nasceu aproximadamente 1390, em Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edmund Willoughby, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Freville em 23 de maio de 1418, em Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1430, com 41 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of derbyshire. Ele faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1448, em Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Willoughby, Nottinghamshire, England: уиллоугби он т волдс, ноттингхамшир, Англия
ru.Willoughby-on-the-Wolds, Nottinghamshire: уиллоугби он т волдс, ноттингхамшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Willoughby родился около 1390 г. в местности уиллоугби он т волдс, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund Willoughby было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Freville 23 мая 1418 г. в местности воллатон, ноттингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1430 году, в возрасте 41 год,  он работал по профессии sheriff of derbyshire. Он умер 15 ноября 1448 г. в местности воллатон, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности уиллоугби он т волдс, ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Willoughby nació aproximadamente 1390, en Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edmund Willoughby, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel Annesely baroness willoughby, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Margaret Freville el 23 de mayo de 1418, en Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1430, a la edad de 41 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of derbyshire. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1448, en Wollaton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Willoughby on the Wolds, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
